title: lichen_link_strerror switch statement missing ENODATA case
description:
Location: firmware/bridge-zephyr/subsys/lichen/lichen_util.h:86-138 (lichen_link_strerror)

Risk: The function lists covered error codes in the comment (line 80-82) but misses ENODATA which is returned by init_standalone_lora() at main.c:89 when lichen_lora_l2_get_eui64() fails.

Additionally, the function is used to decode errors from lichen_link_tx() and lichen_link_rx() but those functions may return other LICHEN-specific error codes beyond LICHEN_EAUTH.

Pattern generating user issue reports: When ENODATA is returned, the log will say unknown error which is not helpful for debugging.

Suggested fix: Add case -ENODATA: return no data available; and review lichen/errno.h for other LICHEN-specific error codes that should be included.
